PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER 1353 9TH AVENUE HOA AS TO RESPONDENT MA, CHRISTINA X.T. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-06-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER 1353 9TH AVENUE HOA'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
